01 / ABOUT
Who's writing the code

I'm a B.Tech Computer Science student at JIIT Noida, currently in my third year. I enjoy turning ideas into working software — from AI-powered developer tools to full-stack web platforms.

My core interests lie in Data Structures & Algorithms, full-stack web development, and AI integration. I like projects that push me to learn something I haven't touched before.
